title.en: Born in Leeds, crafted in Norway - Haaland's worlds about to collide

summary.en: Erling Haaland has guided Norway to their first World Cup since 1998. So what is it like being a global name from a nation with a population of just 5.5 million?
summary.zh-CN: Erling Haaland自1998年以来首次带领挪威参加世界杯。那么，作为一个人口只有550万的国家的全球知名品牌，是什么感觉呢？
